2606.24477.title: video-SALMONN-R$^3$: Learning to ReWatch, ReAsk, and ReAnswer for Efficient Video Understanding
2606.24477.paper_summary: Video large language models (LLMs) are often constrained by computation and memory budgets, leading them to use reduced frame rates and spatial resolutions, which may cause them to miss critical information for question answering (QA). A practical and efficient solution is a two-stage paradigm: first perform coarse video understanding to localize relevant segments, and then re-watch these segments at higher temporal or spatial fidelity. In this paper, we present video-SALMONN-R$^3$, the first end-to-end video-LLM that enables re-watch through reinforcement learning without relying on chain-of-thought (CoT) cold-start. This design removes the need for costly CoT data annotations and avoids CoT-based supervised fine-tuning (SFT), which can otherwise degrade the pretrained video understanding abilities. To address the mismatch between the reasoning-first behavior induced by re-watch and the answer-first tendency of pretrained video-LLMs, we propose a re-answer strategy, in which the model first produces a direct answer in the first watch and then refines it after re-watching. Finally, to improve question adherence during re-watching, we propose a re-ask mechanism that re-injects the query when revisiting localized segments. Experimental results show that video-SALMONN-R$^3$ consistently outperforms both the base model and the QA-SFT baseline, while surpassing prior re-watch-based approaches with significantly lower computational cost. Code, models, and data will be publicly released upon acceptance.
2606.24477.paper_summary_zh: 視頻大型語言模型（LLMs）通常受到計算和記憶體預算的限制，這使得它們使用降低的幀率和空間解析度，可能導致它們錯過關鍵的信息以進行問題回答（QA）。一個實用且高效的解決方案是一個兩階段的範式：首先進行粗略視頻理解以定位相關片段，然後以更高的時間或空間保真度重新觀看這些片段。在本文中，我們提出了video-SALMONN-R$^3$，這是第一個端到端的視頻-LLM，能夠通過強化學習進行重新觀看，而不依賴於思維鏈（CoT）冷啟動。這一設計消除了對昂貴的CoT數據註釋的需求，並避免了基於CoT的監督微調（SFT），否則可能會降低預訓練視頻理解能力。為了解決重新觀看所引發的以推理為先的行為與預訓練視頻-LLMs的以答案為先的傾向之間的不匹配，我們提出了一種重新回答策略，其中模型在第一次觀看時首先生成直接答案，然後在重新觀看後進行細化。最後，為了提高重新觀看期間的問題遵循性，我們提出了一種重新提問機制，當重新訪問定位的片段時重新注入查詢。實驗結果顯示，video-SALMONN-R$^3$始終超越基礎模型和QA-SFT基線，同時以顯著較低的計算成本超越先前基於重新觀看的方法。代碼、模型和數據將在接受後公開發布。
2606.24477.author: Yixuan Li et.al.
2606.24477.authors: Yixuan Li, Guangzhi Sun, Yudong Yang, Wei Li, Zejun MA, Chao Zhang
